steps.title: Substitute x = 9 into the function
steps.content:
We are given $f(x) = 100x + 2$. To find $f(9)$, substitute $x = 9$:
$$f(9) = 100(9) + 2$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
Multiply first, then add:
$$100 \cdot 9 = 900$$
$$900 + 2 = 902$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
